site.description: Motorcycle workshop and shop for accessories, spare parts and gear. Professional service with a personal touch.

hero.title: Your bike in the best hands
hero.subtitle: Professional mechanics, quality parts and selected accessories. Visit our shop or contact us on WhatsApp.

services.title: Workshop services
services.subtitle: Maintenance, repairs and preparation so you can enjoy your bike with total confidence.

mechanics.title: General mechanics
mechanics.description: Inspections, tune-ups and engine, transmission and brake repairs.

tyres.title: Tyres and suspension
tyres.description: Fitting, balancing and suspension setup for maximum comfort and safety.

electric.title: Electrical systems
electric.description: Diagnosis and repair of electrical systems, batteries and lighting.

itv.title: Pre-MOT preparation
itv.description: Pre-inspection and preparation so your bike passes the MOT without surprises.

cta.title: Need help with your bike?
cta.subtitle: Message us on WhatsApp or visit the shop. We're happy to advise you.

home.categoriesSubtitle: Accessories, parts and gear organised by category.

catalog.title: Showcase
catalog.subtitle: Accessories, spare parts and gear available in store.
catalog.emptySubtitle: Try adjusting the filters or check back later.

whatsapp.appointment: Hi {{name}}, I'd like to book a workshop appointment. What availability do you have?
whatsapp.general: Hi {{name}}, I have a question. Can you help me?
whatsapp.article: Hi {{name}}, I'm interested in "{{title}}" ({{price}}). Is it available?

account.registerSuccess: Account created. Check your email if confirmation is required.

admin.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your administrator account

site.title: Website images
site.subtitle: Customize photos and color theme for the public site. Products and categories are edited in their sections.
site.mainImagesHint: Hero, logo, catalog banner and featured sections.
site.logoHint: Shown in the header. Min. 200×200 px.
site.aboutHint: Large photo next to workshop services.
site.serviceImagesHint: One photo per service card. Icon shown if empty.
site.otherImagesHint: Product and category photos are managed in Articles and Categories.
site.colorThemeHint: Pick a coherent palette for backgrounds, buttons and accents. Works with light and dark mode.
site.colorThemeNote: The light/dark toggle stays in the header; the theme adjusts colors for each mode.

classic.name: Classic
classic.desc: Ready Bikes orange on a neutral background. The current brand look.

garage.name: Garage
garage.desc: Warm golden tones, industrial workshop feel.

racing.name: Racing
racing.desc: Bold red and deep backgrounds, sporty and aggressive.

diagnostics.title: Supabase diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Check the connection between the site and your Supabase project.
diagnostics.useChrome: Important: open this page in Chrome (http://localhost:5174/diagnostico), not in the editor preview.
diagnostics.help1: After changing .env: Ctrl+C in terminal → npm run dev → open the URL/port shown in the terminal.
diagnostics.help2: In the browser, https://YOUR-ID.supabase.co should respond (even if it says "invalid route").

overall.ok: Connection OK. Supabase responds and configuration looks valid.
overall.error: Connection problems detected. Follow the red hints below.
